"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6KeXqTkpCAOq1f6XlcH6zcnulu8hGgjlDii7sTSZ4U2","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3259366367838013","user_name":"爱吃缤纷水果茶的廖凡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3259366367838013","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7026630823847660547","book_info":{"abstract":"【搞笑+玩梗+苟+老年热血+SSS级天赋=？？？】

　　叶白觉醒SSS级天赋，背负修罗名，踏上无敌路，铸就至强之位！（划掉）

　　这是一群人拯救世界的搞笑故事。
　
　　梦魇：告诉我，你会做噩梦吗？

　　无痕：你这么嚣张，问过我的剑吗？

　　逍遥：无趣。

　　修罗：看遍百年风流人物，唯梦魇、无痕、逍遥与我修罗齐名！我们四个太强了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7b8a250e3fca06b15f9298e7e240a179","author":"明月老贼","author_id":"","book_id":"7026630823847660547","book_name":"疯了吧！你管这叫SSS级天赋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#0830b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"12.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7026632200141406735","read_count":"127674","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1973146"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"894","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,网游,搞笑轻松,魂穿,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a1b4e5de1048c316522f1d26ccec4632~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779472569&x-signature=u8CvefJF%2FWVk%2B0p8QSftt5cAx1A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2933086741870637","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.5462503e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324015609FC58C77346099732B716"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":83,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25462,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":41109},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7051006292655522595","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书算番茄里难得的好书吧，很稳重，也没有什么费脑的事情，如果为了放松、消遣、打发时间等等、看这本书准没错了。书里的风格主偏向过度稳重类型，无明显毒点，目前来看无女主，不圣母，技能漏洞偏少、就是那个火苗技能+蚊子的搭配，当时看到以后替作者用脚抠出了一个三室两厅，其他的都还好。在这本书里你们能体会到“苟的极致就是幽默”。“论羊毛的108种用法”“视财如命应该是什么样的人”等等。框架搭建的也还算完善，内容也可圈可点、9以上评分还是很复合这本书的，下边的差评应该都是现实里不是很容易的人吧……很多人都是会被差评劝退，emmm……还是推荐看一下吧。这书让我刷新了对“苟”的定义。很强大，希望能“苟”到大结局。做事情的时候满血满蓝状态完成任务的可能性不到99.99%那都是极度危险，没毛病、毕竟人家随便碰你一下你就被秒杀，要么让对方毫无反抗的被秒杀，对方反抗了就会产生被杀的概率。望作者君能在小说里提及一下概率的具体算法加成(^_^*) 让我们读者切身的感受一下99.99%概率的强大与危险。(˶‾᷄ ⁻̫ ‾᷅˵)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641690344,"group_id":"7026630823847660547","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzBE0g7ZqYDvDulOGdYHJCNAGfHCCo5KZTp0KZVfai0H","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/689535ef49b1470eb16a46f4a6f8fcf2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879117&x-signature=4mGYyGoLm5D8X0H3vYFwqb7wrE4%3D","user_id":"2748413472677556","user_name":"我只是一个平凡的人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2748413472677556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7026630823847660547","book_info":{"abstract":"【搞笑+玩梗+苟+老年热血+SSS级天赋=？？？】
